stories.title: Add SQLite configuration to config.go
stories.description: Add SQLitePath config and UseSQLite flag
acceptanceCriteria: config.go has SQLitePath string field with default './data/bazi.db'
config.go has UseSQLite bool that is true when DB_HOST is empty
go build ./cmd/ passes

stories.title: Create FortuneRecord model
stories.description: New GORM model for fortune history persistence
acceptanceCriteria: src/internal/model/fortune_record.go exists with FortuneRecord struct
FortuneRecord has gorm.Model, UserID, ChartID, Date, PeriodType, Pillar (JSON), Score, FiveElement (JSON), Luck (JSON), Advice fields
go build ./cmd/ passes

stories.title: Implement database initialization in main.go
stories.description: initDatabase() function with SQLite/MySQL driver selection
acceptanceCriteria: main.go has initDatabase() that opens SQLite when UseSQLite is true
initDatabase() uses WAL mode for SQLite
AutoMigrate runs for BirthChart and FortuneRecord
go build ./cmd/ passes

stories.title: Create DBChartStore
acceptanceCriteria: src/internal/store/db_chart_store.go exists
DBChartStore implements Create, FindByID, ListByUser, Update methods
go build ./cmd/ passes

stories.title: Create DBFortuneStore
acceptanceCriteria: src/internal/store/db_fortune_store.go exists
DBFortuneStore implements Create, FindByUser, ListByUser methods
go build ./cmd/ passes

stories.title: Wire DB stores into handlers in main.go
acceptanceCriteria: main.go uses DBChartStore and DBFortuneStore instead of in-memory stores
go build ./cmd/ passes

stories.title: Verify end-to-end persistence
stories.description: Test SQLite persistence works for charts and fortune history
acceptanceCriteria: go test ./... passes
data/bazi.db file is created on first run
Chart records persist across server restarts
